raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Request for Account Verification, Statement Copies, and Credit Bureau Dispute Macy 's Credit Card To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to formally dispute a negative credit reporting on my credit profile regarding my closed Macy 's Credit Card account ( issued by Citibank ) and to request an official verification of the account history. I was recently notified of a " late payment '' status, which came as a complete surprise to me. 

According to my recollection, I paid the statement balance in full around XX/XX/year> before traveling abroad. However, due to lost documents, I no longer have the full payment receipts and statements on hand. I believe the subsequent charge of approximately {$12.00} that triggered the bad credit was a residual interest error or an unjustified fee applied after my full payment. As soon as my family member noticed this remaining balance, the exact amount was paid off immediately, and the account was closed. 

To clarify this matter and resolve this dispute fairly, I respectfully request that Citibank provide me with the following documents for my review : Complete transaction and payment history for this account from XX/XX/year> through the date the account was permanently closed. 

Official copies of the billing statements showing how the residual charge was generated. 

Furthermore, since this negative reporting is causing severe damage to my credit score based on what appears to be a billing discrepancy, I request that Citibank review this history and instruct the credit bureaus ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) to remove the inaccurate late payment tradeline. 

Thank you for your cooperation and prompt attention to this urgent matter.
